---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new AST node, ABI export, or behaviour
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What can't you express today, or what's awkward about the current
shape? Concrete example beats abstract description.

## Proposal

What you'd like to see. If it's an AST addition, sketch the JSON
shape and what it should evaluate to.

## Alternatives

Anything you tried, or any way to do this with the existing AST.

## Compatibility

Does this break any existing AST consumer? Any wire format change?
